tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad Financial and Ridership Reports – March 2026
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North Railroad Financial and Ridership Reports – March 2026

payload.title: Metro-North Railroad Financial and Ridership Reports – March 2026
payload.description: Financial and ridership report for Metro-North Railroad covering March 2026 year-to-date budget performance, revenues, expenses, staffing, overtime, and performance indicators.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Total Revenue YTD March 2026
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenue of $213.1 million was $29.4 million lower than the Budget.

tool_args.label: Non-Reimbursable Overtime Overspending Causes
tool_args.raw_text: Overspending of $1.1M vs Adopted Budget through March is primarily driven by higher weather emergencies partially offset by lower programmatic maintenance due to weather preparation and response and lower vacancy coverage.

payload.claim_text: Overspending of $1.1M vs Adopted Budget through March is primarily driven by higher weather emergencies partially offset by lower programmatic maintenance due to weather preparation and response and lower vacancy coverage.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad Non-Reimbursable Overtime

tool_args.label: Maintenance of Way Overtime YTD March 2026
tool_args.raw_text: Maintenance of Way Overtime of $9.0M is 36.1% of YTD March 2026 Actuals. Higher weather emergencies partially offset by lower programmatic maintenance drive overtime costs. Maintenance of Way is unfavorable by $1.1M to Adopted Budget.

payload.claim_text: Maintenance of Way Overtime of $9.0M is 36.1% of YTD March 2026 Actuals. Higher weather emergencies partially offset by lower programmatic maintenance drive overtime costs. Maintenance of Way is unfavorable by $1.1M to Adopted Budget.

tool_args.label: Preliminary Status Note
tool_args.raw_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment.

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the current month's adjusted and unadjusted YTD results are preliminary and will be updated in the subsequent month's YTD results.
payload.description: All financial results in this report are marked as preliminary and subject to revision.
